title: Visible-screen tmux file picker
reason: User requested skipping the Plannotator interview after grill decisions were resolved in chat.
decisions: Use strict visible-screen-only candidates; no repo-wide fallback.
Bind the picker to C-S-a in normal tmux mode and copy-mode.
In fzf, Enter opens in nvim, Ctrl-o opens the default app, and Ctrl-p annotates.
In copy/visual mode, parse the whole visible viewport, not only selected text.
Use conservative real-path matching: full paths, absolute/tilde paths, quoted/backticked tokens, exact basenames and README-without-.md; no generic substring/fuzzy matches.
When no visible files or folders are found, show a tmux message and do not open the popup.
Annotate is Pi-agent-only: Ctrl-p always sends /plannotator-annotate <selected-path> into the source pane, with no standalone CLI fallback.
